sourceWarning: Acqua Bistecca publishes current Washington dinner, brunch, happy-hour, beverage, and dessert PDFs but no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact guide. Positive signals come only from fixed published ingredients, explicitly named species, or mandatory food formats. Optional choices are not merged onto configurable bases. Alcohol-only cocktails, beer, wine-by-the-glass, and the bottle list remain outside this allergen-focused catalog; current nonalcoholic beverages are retained after food and dessert.
